title: Heart Shaped Cake Tin, 3pcs 6 Inch Silicone Love Cake Moulds, Cake Baking Pan Non-Stick Quick Release Suitable Baking Tray for Muffins Puddings Bread
features: Quality materials - The baking tray is made of BPA-free edible silicone, safe, durable, heat resistant, non-toxic and odourless, not easily deformed or torn, and reusable. Temperature range -30°C to 200°C

Easy to use - Your baked goods won't stick to the bottom of the baking tray, this silicone cake baking tray is very flexible. Remove from oven and invert with silicone mold and cake until cool. You can easily pour out the baked goods
Easy to clean - Can be washed directly with water or soapy water and dried
Wide range of applications - For Air Fryer Silicone Liner, sandwich cakes, chiffon cakes, chocolate, muffins, puddings, etc.
Universal size - The 6" size is basically suitable for everyday baking, enjoy baking with your family and friends
description: Product Features: Made of food grade silicone material, environmentally friendly, non-toxic and tasteless, flexible and durable, not easily deformed or torn, The grease is non-stick and can withstand temperatures from -30°C to 200°C. Safe for use in microwave ovens, refrigerators, dishwashers, freezers and ovens. Due to its stable properties, silicone has a long service life and is better suited than other materials. Perfect for weddings, parties, leisure time, get-togethers, birthday occasions, make them with your family or friends! Product specifications: Material: Silicone Colour: Red Packaging: 2 pieces Weight: 160g Caution: 1. Wash before use, then rinse with hot water to disinfect. 2. Wash and dry after use, store in a clean and dry place and avoid direct sunlight. 3. Please thaw and heat after freezing, as it may break if placed directly in the oven. 4. Do not use wire balls, metal rags or other rough materials, as they may break due to cracks.
